title: Bunium cornigerum

intro: Bunium cornigerum, also known as the Horned Carrot or Wild Carrot, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The health benefits of Bunium cornigerum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Bunium cornigerum include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, often used to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
